title: 2026-03-26 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 41.70
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2026-03-26: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 41.70/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2026-03-26, the score printed 41.70/100 in the elevated regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
